sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53520" key="karuhno/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρυηνόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Καρυηνός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n53520.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κάροινον</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
